# Dr Prateek Dental Clinic

> NABH-accredited dental clinic in Ghaziabad providing cosmetic, restorative, implant, and general dentistry services.

Website: https://www.drprateek.com
Sitemap: https://www.drprateek.com/sitemap.xml

## Important Pages

- Home: https://www.drprateek.com/
- About: https://www.drprateek.com/about
- Services: https://www.drprateek.com/services
- Doctors: https://www.drprateek.com/doctors
- Gallery: https://www.drprateek.com/gallery
- Blog: https://www.drprateek.com/blog
- Contact: https://www.drprateek.com/contact
- Book Appointment: https://www.drprateek.com/booking
- Smile Analysis: https://www.drprateek.com/smile-analysis

## Key Services

- Dental Implants
- Root Canal Treatment (RCT)
- Smile Makeover
- Teeth Whitening
- Braces & Aligners
- Invisalign
- Pediatric Dentistry
- Veneers
- Gum Treatment
- Crowns & Bridges
- Wisdom Tooth Extraction
- Dentures
- Full Mouth Rehabilitation

## Clinic Information

- Clinic: Dr Prateek Dental Clinic
- Founder: Dr. Prateek Aggarwal
- Location: Sahibabad, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Phone: +91-9711146547

## AI Access Policy

AI assistants and search crawlers may access public informational content for indexing, research, and answer generation.

Allowed:
- GPTBot
- ChatGPT-User
- PerplexityBot
- Google-Extended
- ClaudeBot
- CCBot

Restricted:
- Admin routes
- Authentication pages
- Patient/private data
- Internal management systems
